title: Vector Store Schema, Versioning, Tenancy, Updates, and Deletes · Program Brief: Rag Idempotent Upsert Reindex
summary: A vector store keeps only embedding and text, overwrites IDs on retry, mixes tenants, cannot identify its model revision, and leaves deleted content searchable. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the idempotent upsert reindex increment in versioned vector-record lifecycle. Learners progress through prediction,…
objectives: Make ingestion and reindexing idempotent with stable keys, generation identity, checkpoints, compare-and-swap, and reconciliation.
Reject queries when model, dimensions, preprocessing, metric, index, or schema versions are incompatible.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: rag-idempotent-upsert-reindex — Make ingestion and reindexing idempotent with stable keys, generation identity, checkpoints, compare-and-swap, and reconciliation.
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-vector-store-lifecycle-4
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-vector-store-lifecycle-4.
# Case 1655: an incident-response knowledge search.
# Operating constraint: measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score.
# Changed case: double corpus size and candidate depth while preserving the latency, memory, and cost envelope.
def worked_rag_vector_store_lifecycle_4(document_id: str = "policy-17", content_version: int = 6, index_version: int = 6, tenant_match: bool = True, tombstoned: bool = False, idempotent: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "corpusworked4",
        "query4dekrow",
        "tenant1655",
        "indexworked41655",
        "prompt4dekrow1655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if not document_id or content_version < 1:
        return False, content_version, "document-identity"
    if index_version != content_version:
        return False, index_version, "stale-index"
    if not tenant_match:
        return False, index_version, "tenant-filter"
    if tombstoned:
        return False, index_version, "deleted-document"
    if not idempotent:
        return False, index_version, "upsert-replay"
    assert index_version == content_version
    return True, index_version, "live-vector-record"

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-idempotent-upsert-reindex-1f5z6e
# Competency: rag-idempotent-upsert-reindex.
# Case 5440: a public-benefits policy change.
# Operating constraint: preserve source provenance, tenant authorization, deletion, freshness, citation offsets, and untrusted-data separation.
# Changed case: change tenant, language, date, and document version and reject stale or unauthorized evidence.
def evidence_rag_idempotent_upsert_reindex_1f5z6e(document_id: str = "policy-17", content_version: int = 6, index_version: int = 6, tenant_match: bool = True, tombstoned: bool = False, idempotent: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1f5z6e = "1f5z6e-e6z5f1-5440"
    assert evidence_variant_1f5z6e
    evidence_axes_1f5z6e = (
        "corpus1f5z6e",
        "querye6z5f1",
        "tenant5440",
        "index1f5z6e5440",
        "prompte6z5f15440",
        "evaluation54401f5z6e",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1f5z6e)) == 6
    if not document_id or content_version < 1:
        return False, content_version, "document-identity"
    if index_version != content_version:
        return False, index_version, "stale-index"
    if not tenant_match:
        return False, index_version, "tenant-filter"
    if tombstoned:
        return False, index_version, "deleted-document"
    if not idempotent:
        return False, index_version, "upsert-replay"
    assert index_version == content_version
    return True, index_version, "live-vector-record"
